objective: Run the pre-registered scored benchmark round and publish results credibly, reproducibly, and defensibly — without compromising embargo, vendor-neutrality, or the integrity of human review.
strategy: (1) drive complete, balanced human review coverage across all reviewable cells; (2) make every published claim reproducible (run + spec hash beside each result); (3) enforce embargo and vendor-fairness before anything goes public.

prep.grounded_context:
# Current-State Summary

This is the **benchmark reviewer portal** — a human-review and presentation layer over a multi-model code-generation benchmark. It ingests benchmark cells, assigns reviewers, records adjudications, and publishes an embargo-gated scorecard. Placeholder context for the viewer test fixture; not a live business.
prep.key_assumptions:
# Key Assumptions

The objective assumes a completed, frozen benchmark run to review and publish. Load-bearing: (1) upstream cells are complete and stable; (2) reviewer capacity covers the assigned cells; (3) embargo transitions are enforced, not just flagged. Neutral placeholder.
prep.outside_view:
# Outside View

Reference class: evaluation/leaderboard efforts that must stay credible under vendor and public scrutiny. Base-rate concern: reproducibility and neutrality claims are easy to assert and hard to defend. Neutral placeholder for the fixture.
